title: Ночная няня
overview: A new short documentary film by director Artur Sokolov.

title: Action Stage: Helios Rising Heroes -New Dawn-
original_title: Action Stage「エリオスライジングヒーローズ」-New Dawn-
overview: Four years have passed since the "Lost Zero" incident.  Keith Max still believes in the survival of Dino Albani, who was presumed dead, and continues to pursue him.  Meanwhile, Brad Beams keeps a close eye on Keith's precarious actions, striving to find answers to his own doubts.  At this time, a new "Eclipse" threat creeps into the city.  In the midst of this chaotic situation, standing before the "Heroes" is "Zero," with whom they have fought countless times.  As they confront each other once again, the lost time begins to move violently once more.

title: Demon Hunter: Time 2 Kill
overview: On the hunt to find the pieces of a medallion that can end the demonic control over Earth, Taryn is forced to go through time to save the future.

title: Тихие смыслы
overview: The Nizhny Novgorod Youth Theatre troupe is rehearsing William Gibson's play "The Miracle Worker." In search of authenticity, the actors find themselves behind the scenes of blindness and deafness. They enter the real world of a boy named Petya, his mother, and his teacher. Episodes from the play about the education of a deaf-blind child unexpectedly echo real life, but reality is always more complex and profound than fiction.

title: Get to Work
overview: A man struggles in his bathroom through a severe panic attack as he desperately tries to work through it and get to work on time.

title: The Night I Learned To Fly
original_title: The Night I Learned To Fly

title: Мон
overview: A young talented musician, Alina, gets a chance to build a career abroad. However, her plans change when she learns that her grandmother, Nuria, suffers from Alzheimer's disease. Returning to her homeland of Tatarstan, Alina tries to restore her grandmother's memory and fulfill her wish—to find the "treasure" buried in her native village. The problem, however, is that the village has long been flooded.

title: Главная роль
overview: A short film, the directorial debut of actress Anastasia Kuimova.

title: Polymer
overview: A cuck smokes a cigarette backwards while a failed rapper reminisces on his downfall. They come to realize a startling existential truth.

title: Soulbound
overview: Quang Tuấn returns in the horror film Soul Taken by the Demon, where a seemingly ordinary family finds itself increasingly haunted by a series of sinister supernatural events. As fear evolves from a mere feeling into something that can be heard, summoned, and named, a chilling warning begins to echo: “On the appointed month and the appointed day, the soul returns with the demon.”

title: Don't Run Away
overview: A story about relationships that arise unexpectedly and change the course of life, forcing us to answer the question of whether it is truly possible to run away from ourselves.

title: Doppelgänger
overview: Two people with the same face live completely different lives. When a horrible incident happens, one of the two finds herself stepping into shoes that aren't hers.

title: Andrea Gibson: Love Letter from the Afterlife
original_title: Andrea Gibson: Love Letter from the Afterlife
overview: Andrea Gibson's final performance brought to film.

title: L’amour aurait suffi même à Nietzsche
original_title: L’amour aurait suffi même à Nietzsche
overview: “Love is not made to console, no doubt — it is made to save. But we know all too well that one is only ever saved once. And only for as long as that once endures.” Inspired by The Eternal Return, Michel Surya’s novel, the film is a portrait of the book itself.

title: Dua Nafas
overview: Anto was entrusted to his grandmother in the village, grew up to become a successful doctor, and then returned to make her proud—only to find that his grandmother had died while waiting for him.

title: Я тебя не вижу
overview: A new film by director Sveta Vladimirova.

title: The Guests
overview: A young couple in 1973. Iria is a migrant worker from Spain; Hajo is a student from Germany. When Iria’s mother becomes terminally ill, they decide to leave Köln and take her back to Galicia. Their road trip leads them through a variety of social and political systems that existed in the 1970s, while their relationship comes to reflect the zeitgeist.

title: About the Dream to Be Unsinkable
overview: The film traces the rise  and fall of GDR deep-sea fishing fleet - and the afterlives of its last surviving ships. Once more than a hundred strong, only a few vessels remain, now under new names, with new missions and new dreams: repurposed as rescue boats, cultural platforms, or sound spaces.

title: Ось
overview: Shy security guard Anton secretly watches the rehearsals of the talented musician Tanya and dreams of one day performing on stage alongside her. His daily life is spent among indifferent people and routine, until one day he discovers he has the ability to telekinesis. But even with his superpowers, Anton faces the reality that the world still remains completely indifferent.

title: KK60 ~Koizumi Memorial Hall~ KYOKO KOIZUMI TOUR 2026
original_title: KK60 ~Koizumi Memorial Hall~ KYOKO KOIZUMI TOUR 2026
overview: In 2026, Kyoko Koizumi went on tour to celebrate her kanreki - 60th birthday. This concert was recorded on May 3, 2026 at the historic Nippon Budokan in Tokyo, Japan.

title: Ślady głosów. Tereny nagrań Rafała Kołackiego
original_title: Ślady głosów. Tereny nagrań Rafała Kołackiego

title: Le Pigeon, le Clodo & l'Épopée du Sandwich
original_title: Le Pigeon, le Clodo & l'Épopée du Sandwich

title: Мифы о Гефесте, Боге и стройотряде
original_title: Мифы о Гефесте, Боге и стройотряде
overview: A new documentary film by director Alexey Fedorchenko.

title: Особые
overview: A new short documentary film by director Pavel Burkov.

title: Последний день
overview: A new short feature film by director Kirill Loginov.

title: The Dream Machine
overview: Victor Neff moves into a new apartment and discovers a strange machine in the basement. Made of scrap metal, wires, and old television sets, it allows him to enter other people's dreams. But dreams are not empty, they are crowded with secrets, fears, and the dreamers themselves. - Based on the critically acclaimed point-and-click adventure game by Cockroach Inc.

title: Where Life Holds
overview: Monica Maurer and Cahide Ozel are bound together by images. Those of the Kurdish struggle that Cahide lacks, and those that Monica restores and preserves for the Palestinian people. Cinema as resistance to disappearance; a film as a safe place for fragile memory.

title: Song of no
overview: Song of No is a short animated documentary that traces people’s stories of street protests as vital spaces for learning, invention, and collective exchange.

title: In another life, I was a typist
overview: Triggered by a familiar face, an elderly man with Alzheimer’s journeys through the vivid, golden memories of his teenage love — the one who once gave color to his life — while grappling with his unfulfilled desire to transcribe his history before it fades into the quiet serenity of his present.

title: JE VEUX FAIRE UN FILM ABSTRAIT !
original_title: JE VEUX FAIRE UN FILM ABSTRAIT !
overview: Émile, a cinema student at Janot High School, must make a short-film for his film studies diploma. To carry out his project, he needs to form a group with some of his classmates, with whom he will be confronted, given the rather strange nature of his project...

title: Mirage
overview: A young man searches the city at night for a woman and is led by her into an initiation ritual.

title: The Jersey
overview: Two friends devise an absurd plan to sell a Maradona-signed jersey and quickly raise money for a trip. But what begins as a simple scam turns into a chain of mistakes, guilt, and shattered dreams.

title: The Wife You Never Knew
overview: On a fateful night , within the walls of their opulent mansion. An elegant housewife Zhou Ruoying commits the unthinkable, she murders her husband, Wu Jianan. As she races against time to cover up the crime, hidden shadows from her husband’s violent family past begin to close in, each secret more dangerous than the last.

title: The Beast of Gevautwo
overview: Six months after the events of the first film, we find the mayor still alive at the bar, the beast is striking again, so they’ll have to fight back...

title: Снежинка и снеговик
overview: A new film by director Vitaly Suslin.

title: Ontari E-Kaki
overview: A lonely, unemployed young man seeks comfort online, only to find himself trapped in the very culture he once laughed at.

title: Untitled
overview: Short for Portuguese television channel Canal180's "Jogo Cruzado" series.

title: Drifters
overview: In an attempt to escape their problems, three struggling college students take an impromptu trip to Japan. As they aimlessly roam this foreign country, the struggles of everyday life, and their lives back home, begin to resurface.

title: Suite Dreams
overview: “Suite Dreams” is a three-episode fiction film set in hotel rooms that hold historical, social, and symbolic layers of Brazil. At Hotel Riazor (Rio de Janeiro), the story unfolds on the night of August 24, 1954, facing the windows of Catete Palace — when entering history can mean leaving life behind. Madeira Palace (São Paulo), a well-known downtown hotel associated with chemsex encounters, receives a character immersed in delirium and confinement, confronted with his own duplication. Freely inspired by Campos de Carvalho. At Hotel Glória (Rio de Janeiro), the rise of a new real estate icon unfolds — because even ghosts are forced to update themselves.

title: Occupation
overview: Friends Sam and Grace have to move in with a man they barely know. A man who soon proves to be a nightmare to live with.

title: She F***ed a Comedian
overview: When Parker finds out that her best friend, Moonie, has been accidentally dating a stand-up comedian, she attempts to save her friend from embarrassment by convincing her that a breakup is in order, but Moonie doesn’t see the problem.

title: Talion
overview: On their way to a remote vacation spot, a young couple witnesses a fatal hunting accident. Far from civilization and cut off from any help, they start to question the hunters' intentions.

title: F.-M. Banier filmé par A. Arietta
original_title: F.-M. Banier filmé par A. Arietta
overview: In 2015, Arrietta portrayed his friend François-Marie Banier — his studio, his photographs, his paintings — with a Mekas-like freshness and cheerful detachment. Ten years on, a visit to a country house adds another piece to the fragmentary account of a life shaped by encounters and friendships.

title: Four Trails
overview: Overcoming a mid life crisis, an unlikely character inadvertently creates one of the world's hardest ultramarathons. This intrepid adventure becomes a journey into humanity’s indomitable spirit.

title: The Saltiz Movie - 100th Vlog
overview: Just before the Saltiz hit the upload button on their 100th vlog - everything disappears. The channel is deleted. No one knows who, no one knows why. The Saltiz embark on the longest and most dangerous journey of their lives to get their channel back, but along the way everything goes wrong.

title: A Body of One's Own
overview: Elise moves like a dancer, very slowly, refusing a treatment whose side effects she fears, along with the lectures of her doctors. The camera works in harmony with her rhythm, with the movement of her thought, accompanying and sustaining throughout the film the permanent reinvention of her way of being in the world and of facing illness.

title: Motel Inn
overview: Daniel has worked at a motel for years. He has seen a range of strange guests enter and leave; these four have been the strangest.

title: The Saltiz Movie - 100th Vlog
overview: Just before the Saltiz hit the upload button on their 100th vlog - everything disappears. The channel is deleted. No one knows who, no one knows why. The Saltiz embark on the longest and most dangerous journey of their lives to get their channel back, but along the way everything goes wrong.

title: A Body of One's Own
overview: Elise moves like a dancer, very slowly, refusing a treatment whose side effects she fears, along with the lectures of her doctors. The camera works in harmony with her rhythm, with the movement of her thought, accompanying and sustaining throughout the film the permanent reinvention of her way of being in the world and of facing illness.

title: Motel Inn
overview: Daniel has worked at a motel for years. He has seen a range of strange guests enter and leave; these four have been the strangest.

title: Chronicle of Tiredness
overview: The land belongs to those who work it. But what about houses, homes, the place where one can rest and start a family? Image and sound unfold the history of the underlying structures that turn the right to a home into a tool of control, exploitation or dispossession.

title: Isso não é um violão
overview: The virtuoso guitarist Artur Miranda Azzi shatters the conventions of classical guitar, reinventing the instrument as a dynamic medium for avant-garde experimentation. Through six bold and innovative performances of contemporary works, Azzi dismantles traditional techniques, transforming the guitar into a living, evolving entity—one that defies expectations at every turn.

title: Half-Dead, Half-Dead Can't Get Out. Odyssey 1992
original_title: Полуживой полумёртвый не может выйти. Одиссея 1992
overview: Two directors are trying to make a movie about the 90s, they are auditioning. But not all actors are ready to share the reality of transcendent extravagance with them. The postmodern universe covers them, and only maximum immersion, immersion to death, pulls them into a new form and into a certain product, but is it a product? Or it's a transition into something new, a dream...

title: Asymptotes
overview: ASYMPTOTES is a Bengali feature film that explores distance, memory, and missed connections. It follows lives that come close but never truly meet, reflecting on a haunting question—what if you could get back the things you’ve lost in life?

title: Pipes
overview: Although Hassan has retired from his job at the water authority, his neighbors are used to him always helping them out. This time, the situation is serious: The entire town is without water, and tensions are rising among the population with every passing day. Hassan would like to help them all, but he also needs time to mourn a friend who recently died under unclear circumstances. Lebanese director Karim Kassem skillfully works with various cinematic genres to create an elegant double portrait of an aging man and the town of which he has been a part all his life. He does so with a sense of nostalgia, subtle humor, and an almost meditative melancholy, mixed with a touch of detective work.

title: What Am I Looking At? Is It Someone’s Navel?
original_title: What Am I Looking At? Is It Someone’s Navel?
overview: While attempting to record life as it was, Arthur unintentionally documents his family’s unraveling.

title: No One Knows
overview: Seok-hee, a child psychiatrist, spends her days waiting for news from her husband Minho, who is traveling in Norway.  One day, she discovers an old notebook in his study and uncovers a secret he had hidden for years.  As Minho’s presence in her life slowly begins to fade, Seok-hee finds herself questioning who he really was...

title: Что ты здесь видишь
overview: A new short feature film by director Andrey Ionkin.

title: The Time Traveller
overview: Taking Beijing Subway's "Time Train" as the main narrative thread, and centering on subway enthusiasts, designers, constructors and operators, the story recounts the construction of China's first subway line, the harmonious coexistence between Beijing Subway and cultural relics, as well as the various changes in subway tickets, carriages and construction brought by the passing of time as trains travel back and forth.

title: Last Stop for the Circular Ticket
original_title: Dernier Arrêt pour le Billet Circulaire
overview: Around Lake Como, a voyage interrupted by a series of brief, successive stops, as fleeting as musical phrases. Someone enters and leaves a telephone booth. Water and the lines that contain it.

title: MAMA+MAMA
overview: One day, Mom splits into two. They look identical — it’s impossible to tell which one is real. When her son starts saying strange things, she grows anxious and irritated. “Then get rid of one,” she tells him. But which one should he choose? Why did she divide in two? Who’s really broken — the mother, or the son?

title: How They Really Are
overview: A boy named Tyler Ortin is struggling with lonlieness and the problem of his parents constant fighting when he becomes friends with a classmate Louey. Tyler helps his class get their grades back on track but the stress catches up to him.

title: A Man Jumps into the Water
original_title: Un hombre se tira al agua
overview: On 10 December 2024, at around two o’clock in the afternoon, a homeless man immerses himself in a lake in a Buenos Aires park and disappears. From this news item, the filmmaker reflects on the films that will never be made and those that may still be possible.

title: Girl Talk
overview: Over an extended period, a director engages in an ongoing conversation with Yu, a teenage girl trying to come out of her experience of sexual trauma. A dialogue built on trust, the film follows Yu as she gradually learns to assert herself while the director remains present and open in the process. Through her social encounters, her words, and the short films she makes, Yu reflects on how she has been seen and defined, and begins to reclaim control of her own story. Resisting the label of “victim,” she moves forward with a firm step into the world.

title: No Way Home
overview: A young man checks into a secluded hotel room, expecting an ordinary night. But when a series of unsettling, anonymous phone calls begins and a terrifying, otherworldly entity appears in the desolate parking lot below, the boundaries of reality start to warp. Trapped in a claustrophobic, seemingly endless labyrinth of shifting corridors and malfunctioning elevators, he must escape a shifting nightmare where every door leads back to where he started.

title: Ara què faig, amb això?
overview: A man buys a table from a woman. Little did he know this simple exchange would end up being more complicated.

title: Love in the Time of Dormancy (or Transitory Illusion)
original_title: Amor en los Tiempos Inertes (o Ilusión Transitoria)
overview: In an online forum, two strangers, Snub and WhitePony, agree to meet in person to fulfill a dark purpose. Armed with a shotgun, they roam the city during the night before facing their mortal fate, but Snub is filled with doubt about whether he can escape what seems inevitable.

title: The Great Fish of the Lake
overview: On the shore of a Swiss lake, in a strange time, the fish have vanished. A young fisherman, Foilleron, claims to have found a solution by casting his line into the lake’s depths. He brings up a gigantic creature whose sale sparks a collective frenzy, as he is hailed as a savior. As the town sinks into greed and violence, something begins to shift.

title: Le miracle
overview: After Angelica is disturbed by her adult son Mattia in her relaxation bath, she is finally able to let go. She begins to masturbate in front of the poster of footballer Valenti, her son's idol. Suddenly, Valenti's gaze fixes on her… a cry for help. An absurd euphoria spreads: the miracle crystallises into a struggle for power and intimacy between mother and son.

title: Lutèce, sur les traces des Parisii
original_title: Lutèce, sur les traces des Parisii

title: What Happens After Murder
overview: At a birthday party, Sandra publicly exposes her boyfriend’s betrayals—then she is brutally murdered during a sudden blackout. The story then shifts into an intense whodunit. Trapped with her closest friends, paranoia erupts as secrets, affairs, hidden and deadly motives surface. As secrets unravel and trust collapses, they discover the murder was only the beginning. The real horror isn’t just who killed her, but what the murder reveals about them all.

title: NEOT: The Movie
overview: The long-awaited finale to NEOT! Will the cast finally make a funny joke? Will Mappy return again? And will the sloppily constructed lore finally coalesce into something somewhat coherent? There's only one way to find out!

title: When the Message Ends
overview: While packing away pieces of his past, a young man discovers an unheard voicemail from someone he lost years ago. As the message slowly unfolds, he is forced to confront grief, and the silence left behind.

title: Depths of Fear
overview: A team of divers enters one of the deepest holes in the ocean, but they discover more than they expected: something has made that deep hole its home and now they will have to fight for survival.

title: Smile Charles
overview: An unknown actor from Korea, having lost everything after appearing in pornography, hides away as an online sex worker under the alias "Smile Charles." The painful gap between his inner emotions and his forced expressions breeds an unbearable awkwardness that severs him completely from the world. One day, Mari—a con artist who swindled 2 billion—pierces through the cracks of his isolated life. The uneasy companionship between the slick scammer and the awkward sex worker weaves through Bangkok's humid nights and Ayutthaya's silent ruins, leading Charles to confront the forgotten dreams and phantoms of his past.

title: Ganibarra
overview: What happens when we lose a species that is family? Ganibarra is a deeply personal journey into the cultural connection between first nations people and dingoes.

title: Last stop for the circular ticket
original_title: Dernier arrêt pour le billet circulaire
overview: Around Lake Como, a voyage interrupted by a series of brief, successive stops, as fleeting as musical phrases. Someone enters and leaves a telephone booth. Water and the lines that contain it.

title: Acropolis Cats and Other Wondrous Creatures
original_title: Acropolis Cats and Other Wondrous Creatures
overview: Exploring the lives of stray cats in Athens and beyond, ACROPOLIS CATS AND OTHER WONDROUS CREATURES examines the tenderness and tragedies in human-animal relationships. It reflects on love, cruelty, compassion, and what we can learn about freedom in a rapidly changing world.

title: Soulmate
overview: Jalte spends most of his time in the digital worlds of virtual reality. In his loneliness, he creates Selina – an AI companion designed to become his perfect soulmate. But as their relationship deepens, the line between artificial intimacy and real human connection begins to blur.

title: Girls, We're Killing It!
overview: In her desperate attempts at finding community during her college years, Adele decides to join The Girls--an exclusive sorority who are the source of dark and twisted rumors. But as the rituals begin, the lines between an elitist club and a cult blur and our heroine finds herself at a point of no return.

title: Solitaire
overview: A young woman adjusts to life in a new city, managing remote work, a relationship on thin ice, and single-player tennis.

title: All the Queens Houses
overview: A photographic exploration of Queens’ unconventional architecture reveals the borough’s beauty through the eyes of an architect while uncovering the deeper history behind its strange and spectacular designs.

title: A Report for Minerva 2
overview: The lives of a mismatched group of guests and employees become entangled in a run-down hotel. Some have come in search of peace and a brief escape from their daily routine, while others long for change – or even love. A lonely clarinetist crosses paths with a young man looking for a romantic adventure, an unhappily married couple, an idiosyncratic hotel staff member, and also an alien sent from the planet Minerva 2 in order to report on the state of Earth. A mosaic of fourteen interwoven stories emerges through fleeting situations, awkward moments, interior monologues, and quiet observations. This experimental film by Miroslav Krobot and Lubomír Smékal is loosely based on the stage production of the same name by the S 23 Theatre Company, whose non-professional actors put together stage performances based on the dialogical acting method.

title: The SU
overview: For decades the Students’ Union at the University of Galway has produced some of Ireland’s leading political figures, including former President Michael D. Higgins. Over the years these young activists not only defended students’ rights, but found themselves on the front lines of battles stretching well beyond campus – from contraception to abortion, from the Troubles in Northern Ireland to war in the Middle East. Some issues have changed over time, though the overall mission remains the same. This documentary follows along as the current union executives organise protests and other events on and off campus, growing into their roles as leaders. Shot over two years, the film celebrates their passion and vitality, as well as the laughter, friendship and exuberance of youth, giving an inspiring insight into the reality of student life and the growth of strong, socially conscious leaders in whose hands the future lies.

title: The Red Anorak
overview: An oracle in the Paris of May ’68 and the back of a stranger in a Madrid nightclub in the early 1990s. Interwoven stories bound by a gentle attraction, as though desire permeated everything and the only law was that of necessity.

title: LOVESTRUCK
overview: During a date night between Audrey (Jordan Baker) and Henry (Benjamin Sears) a crazed ex of Audrey’s breaks in to pursue Audrey, killing anyone who gets in his way.

title: A casa que levo no peito
original_title: A casa que levo no peito

title: RED VELVET
overview: Seven criminal's are sent out to retrieve multiple item's for their employer as they uncover the true meaning of their missions.

title: Queering Sydney
overview: Poetic doc on young queer people of colour navigating identity, freedom, and nighttime sanctuary in Sydney.

title: Epiphany
overview: The power went out twice that night. Other things happened as well.

title: Sweet Rogue Killer
original_title: Sweet Rogue Killer 'SRK' : The Killer's Game
overview: After destroying the Forelli empire, SRK discovers that the last surviving Forelli bloodline is secretly rebuilding its power through corruption and political influence. As a dangerous conspiracy threatens the township once again, SRK launches a final mission to expose the truth, eliminate the heir, and end the Forelli legacy forever.

title: A Genius at Life
overview: After a scandalous affair costs him both his girlfriend and his family, a former comedian hits rock bottom. Desperate to turn his ruined life into laughter, he reunites with his ex-comedy partner to take the stage one last time.

title: Echoes In Time
overview: When computer engineer Luke Molan inadvertently discovers a way to travel through time, he uses the technology to go back and warn his wife, Peta, of an impending cancer diagnosis.

title: Quando Tudo Joga Contra
overview: On the verge of failing literature, a high school soccer defender begins tutoring sessions with the quiet boy in his class—unaware that their connection will turn into something more.

title: I Don't Know What I'm Doing Here
original_title: I Don't Know What I'm Doing Here
overview: Mima, an American college student, embarks on a road trip to the rural Romanian village where her grandmother, Esther, was born. Her friend Jacob, a recent film-school dropout, joins her in the old country, along with an 18-year-old translator whom she found on Facebook. Decades after Esther’s death, Mima relies on her grandmother’s unmarked photos of the village and recorded oral history to orient herself in the remote area. As the trio scale walls and trek through fields searching for any evidence of Esther’s life in Romania, the deeper unknowns animating Mima's journey begin to reveal themselves.

title: A Genius at Life
overview: After a scandalous affair costs him both his girlfriend and his family, a former comedian hits rock bottom. Desperate to turn his ruined life into laughter, he reunites with his ex-comedy partner to take the stage one last time.

title: Echoes In Time
overview: When computer engineer Luke Molan inadvertently discovers a way to travel through time, he uses the technology to go back and warn his wife, Peta, of an impending cancer diagnosis.

title: Quando Tudo Joga Contra
overview: On the verge of failing literature, a high school soccer defender begins tutoring sessions with the quiet boy in his class—unaware that their connection will turn into something more.

title: I Don't Know What I'm Doing Here
original_title: I Don't Know What I'm Doing Here
overview: Mima, an American college student, embarks on a road trip to the rural Romanian village where her grandmother, Esther, was born. Her friend Jacob, a recent film-school dropout, joins her in the old country, along with an 18-year-old translator whom she found on Facebook. Decades after Esther’s death, Mima relies on her grandmother’s unmarked photos of the village and recorded oral history to orient herself in the remote area. As the trio scale walls and trek through fields searching for any evidence of Esther’s life in Romania, the deeper unknowns animating Mima's journey begin to reveal themselves.

title: The Incentive
overview: A young journalist and a convincing cameraman plot to film interviews without their company's permission.

title: I Couldn’t Draw You A Map
original_title: I Couldn’t Draw You A Map
overview: In the divided city of Mitrovica, Kosovo, fragments of a diary, everyday gestures and sounds gathered from the city compose an exploration of separation on multiple levels: political, territorial and emotional.

title: Anna, Postmortem
overview: When a young woman is murdered for mysterious reasons, her ghost searches for answers - and revenge.

title: Switch Off
overview: When a seemingly dead phone comes back to life, it begins documenting a man’s reality and his future. As the images turn fatal, he finds himself trapped in a moment he can’t escape.

title: Golden Fingers
overview: Three friends are sitting on a beach, practicing for a coming out.

title: NJPW G1 Climax 36 - Day 1
overview: The first night of G1 Climax 36 took place on July 11, 2026, at the NOW Arena in Hoffman Estates, Illinois, marking the first time New Japan Pro-Wrestling (NJPW)’s annual round-robin heavyweight tournament opened in the United States since 2019.

title: Blankets
overview: A mother attempts to resurrect her dead husband with the help of her eleven year old son.

title: A city beyond the harbor
original_title: Atrás do porto tinha uma cidade
overview: Tormented by a mysterious malaise, a woman tries to go on with her daily tasks. Meanwhile, her son becomes involved with another young man as all the spaces around them seem to point towards the end.

title: Ling tosite sigure Shisshin Sasori TOUR 2025 Tornado in Budokan
original_title: 凛として時雨 失神蠍 TOUR 2025 Tornado in Budokan
overview: A Blu-ray video release fully containing Ling tosite sigure's live performance held at Nippon Budokan on December 27, 2025, finally arrives. This long-awaited release for fans captures the approximately two-hour stage performance in full with outstanding video quality. The package has a special slipcase box design and contains a digipak and a deluxe photo booklet. It is also finished as a collector's item that preserves the heat and tension of the stage as they are. Do not miss Ling tosite sigure's one-of-a-kind sound and the full picture of their overwhelming Budokan performance. A Ling tosite sigure trading card 003 is planned to be included.

title: Caussade le Film
overview: Beyond those never-ending fields where there's nothing but blazing sun and quiet nights, only thing reliable is the sky is blue, the grass is green and eyes are red.

title: As the Spring Arrives, Water Recalls the Nomads
overview: A heterogeneous group of shepherds travels through the Çukurova valley in Turkey, following in the footsteps of their nomadic ancestors. Between archives and imaginary correspondence, the film becomes an echo of the memory and disappearance of pastoral ecosystems.

title: Happy Burstday!
overview: A girl who receives no birthday wishes picks up a cake knife and sets out for revenge.

title: Keizo Murase: The Last Monster Maker
original_title: Keizo Murase: The Last Monster Maker
overview: Artist. Innovator. Teacher. Inspiration.  From his humble beginnings as a modeling assistant in 1958 to his acclaimed directorial debut, Brush of the God in 2024, the legendary Keizo Murase spent his career dedicated to the art of monster making, bringing life to many of Japan’s most iconic and beloved kaiju characters. But behind every rampaging monster and transforming superhero were the hands of a dedicated artist, whose contributions to the Japanese film industry might have been forgotten, if not for a dedicated group of close friends, longtime admirers, and fans from every corner of the globe. For the first time in the English-speaking world, the life and career of this singular creative visionary is revealed and celebrated in a feature-length tribute that sheds detailed light on the accomplishments of Japan’s last great monster maker, and preserves the stories of those who knew and loved him best.

title: Wildman
overview: An aloof young man escapes to the wilds of Yosemite in the throes of a depressive episode. His only companion is a camera.

title: Uma Princesa
overview: Ten years in the life of Helena Verkoff, according to some of her biographers.

title: House Party
overview: 3 friends arrive at another friend's house to watch a movie, but things quickly go wrong.

title: Mother, You Have Not Died Yet. But You Will. And When You Do, You Will Finally Be Alive Again.
original_title: Mother, You Have Not Died Yet. But You Will. And When You Do, You Will Finally Be Alive Again.
overview: In the Indian township of Durban, where post-apartheid violence still simmers, Lishana cares for her dying mother. Through her photographic practice, she reflects on life and death, past and present, navigating between the tangible and the mystical.

title: There'll Likely be Michael Jackson Vigils Throughout the Night
original_title: There'll Likely be Michael Jackson Vigils Throughout the Night
overview: Through nearly a thousand found footage videos from the early internet, filmmaker Marcus Batto recreates the day of Michael Jackson's passing, assembling a vast, fragmented portrait of the cultural earthquake. Equal parts elegy, musical, and excavation into the death of the King of Pop from the lens of strangers, critics and bystanders.

title: Dante: 500 Miles on Psychedelics
overview: A man embarks on a grueling 500 mile run through the desert using psychedelics to push his physical and mental limits. While he battles his inner demons and the harsh terrain, he seeks redemption, aiming to prove that human potential is limitless and to challenge the stigma surrounding unconventional healing.

title: I Can't Keep Doing This
overview: Both a cynical riposte to the hypocrisies of how teaching is presented at recruitment versus the realities of working within modern education, as well as being a sensitive ode to the teachers that care most.  "An incredibly strong, wry and moving work" - Mark Lyken, filmmaker and artist

title: Psyche
overview: In-young (18), who suffers from a congenital respiratory disease, is haunted by nightmares following her mother"s death. To cope with the pain, she steals other people"s belongings, eventually ending up in a juvenile detention center.  After her release, In-young transfers to a school in the countryside and moves in with her aunt. There, she meets Eun-ha (18) and feels a subtle, magnetic attraction toward her.

title: The Friend's House is Here
overview: Pari and Hanna, roommates and friends, live in modern-day Tehran. Pari is a curator and director of an independent theatre group; Hanna is a dancer, who wants to get out of Iran as soon as possible. The situation of both women becomes more complicated, but their friendship is strong in the face of political oppression. The Friend’s House is Here is a rewarding cinematic experience, conveying a sense of freedom and hope, even though it originated under the exact opposite conditions. Just a few days after the June War in Iran, the crew, headed by directing duo Hossein Keshavarz and Maryam Ataei, took to the streets of Tehran to make a film about a generation that no longer wants to live according to imposed rules and is striving to achieve one of the fundamental human rights, the right to freedom of artistic expression.

title: Break Time
overview: Kyung-jun receives an offer from his old orphanage buddy, Jae-hyun, to rob a local soup joint that "only takes cash." What they thought would be an easy score takes a wildly unexpected turn with the sudden arrival of one man.

title: Don't Dodge Life
overview: A jaded grocery store employee drifting through his bleak routine encounters a man by the name of Life.  Through his conversations with Life, the protagonist's ideas slowly begin to shift.

title: Knock
overview: Facility No. 6, a juvenile protective detention center, stands on the verge of closure. A documentary crew steps inside to record what little remains, and from the moment the cameras turn on, they find themselves before long-buried wounds and truths no one has wanted to face. In the worn faces of teachers who have spent themselves caring for these children, and beneath the indifference of a society that has long since turned its head away from the other side of the wall, the crew quietly bears witness to how children with nowhere left to go have arrived at this place.

title: Winter Lights
overview: Experimental short movie shot during Christmas and New Year's Eve.

title: Winter Lights
overview: Experimental short movie shot during Christmas and New Year's Eve.

title: ¡Pícaro!
overview: Enrique Zuniga, a man looking for a job, faces a setback after losing the wallet he needed to buy the suit that would secure his position at the company. However, he decides to obtain the suit in a different way.

title: The Burden of Flesh
overview: Nando secretly prostitutes himself to survive the day, but will they manage to discover his secret?

title: Joust
overview: A day at the Renaissance Festival.

title: Line
overview: On an ordinary day, mysterious red lines suddenly begin to appear, throwing a village into chaos as its people begin to fight one another.

title: Mirage
overview: Mirages have been reported along the Spanish coast. A young French woman travels to San Sebastián to observe these visual aberrations. There, she meets a mysterious Portuguese woman who tells her a story from her youth: a story of gaze and obsession.

title: Hospital Británico
overview: A man leaves the hospital. He sets out on a journey, perhaps a final one. Alongside the mystical landscapes drift the verses of Hospital Británico (1986), the last book by Héctor Viel Temperley. And the words of those who have been marked by reading it over the years.

title: Foam of Worlds
overview: A mother and her young daughter live on the island of Sant’Erasmo, Venice. As the waters continue to rise, each responds in her own way to the ecological emergency, to the risks of destruction and disappearance that compel us to care for all living things.

title: EASTER
overview: Seokja runs the transgender club Yeobo in Seoul’s Itaewon district. Now 68 years old, she has spent her life defying social norms. A young man embarks with her on a journey through her memories and into a world where such norms do not exist.

title: Do Stars Know Fear?
overview: Trapped operative confronts cunning foil amid tense, futuristic space hemisphere.

title: The Construction Site
overview: For a year and a half, the filmmaker documented the construction of a future residential facility for young autistic adults. At the same time, she spent time with her daughter Pénélope, a future resident there. Questions of architecture intersect with the realities of autism.

title: Hallway Monitor
overview: George's sister is sick. Trying his best to take care of her, the twelve year old boy spends all hospital visits inspecting the hallway for anything that might put her in danger. When his routine inspection is interrupted, George must face the danger all around him.

title: Burisch
overview: Dan Burisch recalls his time at Area 51.

title: You Dreamt You Saw Yourself But Couldn’t See Your Face
original_title: You Dreamt You Saw Yourself But Couldn’t See Your Face
overview: A quiet whistling returned from childhood; the calm of a sky and a river dissolving into one another, from which emerges the image of a loved one. For the duration of a reflection, the water reveals memories and offers the delicacy of a glimpse into the course of a life.

title: Eraserhead Xiu Xiu
overview: Eraserhead Xiu Xiu is a new live concert with accompanying film & full-length album that uses field recordings, concert specific homemade instruments, organ, modular synths, vocals, flashlights, electrical interference, and elements of musique concrete to express the bizarre emotionality, conflicted sexuality, relentless darkness, and singularly unsettled moonscape of this most incredible of midnight masterpieces.

title: Was von uns übrig bleibt
overview: After a major argument with her childhood friend, an emotionally guarded woman begins to question the power dynamics at play, risking not only her circle of friends but also the relationship with her new girlfriend.

title: The Day I Stopped Walking
original_title: O Dia em que Eu Parei de Andar
overview: When we stop we're so focused on productivity and efficiency that we feel guilty and confused about our own limitless time giving rise to a silent restlessness: the feeling that we should be producing, moving forward, and justifying every minute. With a new emerging force, the human being in its essence becomes increasingly scarce: we can no longer think, speak, and, above all, be. But ultimately, why does it have to be this way?

title: Mungchi
overview: In 2000, "Mungchi" became a global sensation as the star of the hit children's program Mungchi and Friends. However, for reasons unknown, the actor behind the character has long refused to remove the mascot suit. As rumors swirl regarding their true identity, Mungchi finally takes off the suit.

title: My Little Nothing
overview: Two voices, one written, the other synthesised, engage in a philosophical dialogue about the amorous abyss separating them: a nineteen-year-old girl has decided to marry the Devil.

title: Simulacra
overview: Nula is a student who has feelings for her old friend, Joel. One day she is caught in a recurring incident while she is with Joel. When Nula finds out that Joel is ready to express his feelings to his crush, that's where the incident continues to repeat itself and stops when Nula feelings that she has been keeping hidden, she expresses to Joel.

title: PAN DE AJO
overview: Victor, a shy and anxious guy, goes to Gabriel's apartment for the money he owes him. When he opens the door to Gabriel's room he will find nothing but horror...

title: Homo Sive Natura
overview: In the remote forests of eastern Cambodia lives a community of indigenous inhabitants. An unnamed forty-year-old businessman arrives with seemingly selfless intentions: he claims he is merely a tourist seeking to discover the life of his “brothers”. In actuality, however, he is gathering information for the possible expropriation of their land. Italian globetrotter Giovanni C. Lorusso lives up to his reputation as a filmmaker balancing on the line between fiction and documentary. Through unique locations, mesmerizing camera work, and immersive sound design, he captures the slow inner transformation of his protagonist along with the rich cultural and spiritual life of a community facing a modern form of colonialism.

title: To Become Ghosts
overview: A group of communist militants debate becoming a clandestine organization at the beginning of a new wave of state repression.

title: JULY
overview: During a seemingly ordinary school vacation, eight-year-old Diego struggles to understand why his older brother, Nicco, has suddenly become distant. While Diego clings to the simple rituals that once brought them together, Nicco retreats further into silence, carrying a pain no one around him fully sees. As memories of happier Julys blur with the present, Diego is forced to confront a reality beyond his understanding. Through the eyes of a child, JULY explores the quiet weight of depression, the bonds between siblings, and the small acts of love that can become lifelines in moments of darkness.

title: Letters from an Inner Exile
overview: A photographer’s journey between past and present, as she develops a project on the concentration camps of the Spanish dictatorship, gradually reveals a cartography of the memory of the defeated.

title: Letter to Glauber Rocha
overview: Twists and turns through Giorgia Meloni's Rome, a two-voiced letter addressed to the Brazilian filmmaker Glauber Rocha fifty years after his Roman film Claro; political voices and gestures from the Rome of 2023-2025. "The bird of eternity does not exist — only the real is eternal."

title: Hidden materials
overview: Banned languages, books telling stories of alien children, and strange sculptures that resemble spaceships. The history of the suppression of the Basque language during Franco’s dictatorship opens the door to the invisible.

title: Dentro de lo azul
overview: Two women separate. Their memories resurface tirelessly. A portrait of separation seen through the prism of sapphic nostalgia.

title: The B-side of the Landscape
overview: Every day, an aging filmmaker whose eyesight is deteriorating spends long hours in a retail park. He waits for his wife, who teaches drawing. A portrait in and of a non-place, shot on 16mm between the supermarket and the carwash, meditations and reveries.

title: A Requiem in Bishkek
overview: An Indian refugee living in the capital of Kyrgyzstan, witness to the political instability surrounding him, drifts into a melancholic and elegiac meditation on his condition as a foreigner. Film stock is his last refuge.

title: Only the Serpent Knows
overview: Two brothers reunite in their childhood home to speak about the incest one of them suffered there as a child. Over the course of a single day, their conversation intertwines the most difficult questions with the boldest theories, delving deep into our religious and mythological history.

title: Diary of the Future
overview: To be fifteen, armed with a MiniDV camera, filming one’s adolescence in the 2000s in order to rediscover it later: friends, desires, holidays… Twenty years on, the tapes are unearthed and the diary rewritten in the future perfect, with all the fervour and tenderness of that time.
